inputs.titre: Début de la construction de la Cité Interdite à Pékin

reason: The image depicts a crowd of people in front of a large, traditionally styled building that resembles architecture found in the Forbidden City. However, the clothing of the individuals is anachronistic. Many are dressed in modern clothing styles. The general appearance of the people is inconsistent with a construction scene from 1406. Also, some of the hats are modern and not something from the Ming dynasty.
